SELECT 
    s.School, 
    s.DOCType, 
    (f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) AS enrollment_difference
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    f.`FundingType` = 'Locally funded'
HAVING 
    enrollment_difference > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(f2.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) AS avg_difference
        FROM 
            frpm f2
        JOIN 
            schools s2 ON f2.CDSCode = s2.CDSCode
        WHERE 
            f2.`FundingType` = 'Locally funded'
    );
